reviews.comment:
Demasiada gente ya que es un punto estratégico de rutas en La Pampa pero debido a la Gran demanda NO HABIA COMBUSTIBLE y veníamos desde Mza con el tanque casi vacío...muy lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Too many people, since it's a strategic point on routes in La Pampa, but due to high demand there was no fuel and we came from Mendoza with an almost empty tank...very unfortunate.

reviews.comment:
Son unos chorros ventajeros, pasé un dia antes del feriado largo, el agua para mate $20, dos dias después y sólo porque es feriado largo $50 una ficha que solo te llena el termo durante 20 segundos. Más chorros y ventajeros no se puede! Asco dan, los baños una mugre tambien.

(Translated by Google)
They're a bunch of rip-off artists. I went the day before the long weekend, and water for mate was $20. Two days later, just because it was a long weekend, it was $50 for a token that only fills your thermos for 20 seconds. They couldn't be more of a rip-off! They're disgusting, and the bathrooms are filthy too.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia Gabriela el agua caliente para los socios es gratis. Saludos
